Compliance.description: ISO9001:2015, SABS ISO9001, NCCA founding member, Green Building Council, HACCP, B-BBEE Level 1, PAIA manual; no regulatory issues 2025/2026.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.5/5 (2 negative reviews on admin, not cleaning); Indeed employee 3.7/5 (146 reviews); limited consumer-facing reviews.

Product Value.description: Tailored commercial cleaning across sectors; no consumer pricing/transparency; value in scale/expertise.

Innovation.description: No app/digital booking; claims strategic innovation; 2025 plans for AI/IoT per LinkedIn.

Customer Support.description: Phone (011 796 0000), regional sales emails, head office; no response time data; HelloPeter no replies.

Accessibility & Security.description: PAIA/POPIA manual published; basic website; no security issues found. Digital access limited to contact forms/phone.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: No public 2025/2026 ZAR pricing; quote-based for commercial contracts

socialSentiment.summary: Limited; HelloPeter negative (2), Indeed employee average 3.7/5, LinkedIn positive company posts, no recent X complaints.
